verdict: Olaplex Hair Perfecting Ionic Power Dryer is a hair care tool, not a facial skincare device, making it incongruent with this skincare analysis. The ionic technology supports hair health but offers no facial skin benefits.

_research.name: Olaplex Hair Perfecting Ionic Power Dryer
_research.con: Completely irrelevant to facial skincare analysis and should not appear on skincare tools comparison list.
